zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Clifford II於1148年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾克利福德時，他的父親Walter De Clifford35歲，母親Margaret de Tosny34歲。他於1185年與Agnes Condet在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1199年被列為sheriff of herefordshire。他去世於1222年1月22日在他的家鄉享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Clifford II于1148年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾克利福德时，他的父亲Walter De Clifford35岁，母亲Margaret de Tosny34岁。他于1185年与Agnes Condet在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1199年被列为sheriff of herefordshire。他去世于1222年1月22日在他的家乡享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Clifford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Clifford in Devon, Gloucestershire, and Yorkshire, and in particular Herefordshire. The placename is derived from Old English clif ‘slope’ + ford ‘ford’.

Irish: adoption of the name in 1 above as Anglicization of several Irish names, especially Ó Clúmháin ‘descendant of Clúmhán’, which was the surname of an ecclesiastical family in Sligo and can be traced back to the 12th century. The personal name meant ‘little hairy one’, a diminutive of Irish clúmach ‘hairy’, from clúmh ‘feathers, plumage, down; hair or fur’. Clifford was also adopted for Coleman and in Fermanagh for Crifferty, Clifferty, and Cliffordy, which are Anglicized forms of Mac Raibheartaigh (compare Rafferty ).

History: A powerful Anglo-Norman family of this name in England and Ireland trace their descent from Walter de Clifford, who took the name from Clifford (Castle) in Herefordshire in the 12th century, after acquiring the Clifford barony by marriage.

variants.name: Coleman
meanings: Irish and English: from the Middle English personal name Col(e)man, Old Irish Colmán, earlier Columbán, adopted as Old Norse Kalman. It was introduced into Cumbria, Westmorland, and Yorkshire by Norwegians from Ireland and probably spread widely across England. Ó Colmáin (‘descendant of Colmán’) was the name of an Irish missionary to Europe, also known as Saint Columban(us) (c. 540–615), who founded the monastery of Bobbio in northern Italy in 614. Columbanus is formally a derivative of the Latin for ‘dove’, seen in the name of the 6th-century missionary known in English as Saint Columba (521–597), who converted the Picts to Christianity. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
Irish: from Mac Colmáin or Ó Colmáin ‘son (or descendant) of Colmán’.
Americanized form of Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Kalman   or   Kolman  .

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Clifford II was born in 1148, in Clifford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Walter De Clifford, was 35 and his mother, Margaret de Tosny, was 34. He married Agnes Condet in 1185, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. In 1199, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as sheriff of herefordshire. He died on 22 January 1222, in his hometown, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Clifford II est né en 1148, à Clifford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Walter De Clifford, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Tosny, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Condet en 1185, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. En 1199, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of herefordshire. Il est décédé le 22 janvier 1222, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Clifford II 1148 in Clifford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Walter De Clifford 35 und seine Mutter Margaret de Tosny 34. Er hat 1185 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Condet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1199, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of herefordshire aufgeführt. Er starb am 22. Januar 1222 im Alter von 74 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

ko.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 프램프턴 비 시렌스스터
ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Clifford II(이)가 1148년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 클리퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Walter De Clifford(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Tosny(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Agnes Condet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1199년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of herefordshire이었다. 그는 1222년 1월 22일 그의 고향에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Condet em 1185, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. ru.Frampton, Gloucestershire, , England: фрамптон би сиренсестир, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Clifford II родился в 1148 г. в местности клиффорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Walter De Clifford было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Tosny, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Condet в 1185 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. В 1199 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии sheriff of herefordshire. Он умер 22 января 1222 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 74 лет.

Se casó con Agnes Condet en 1185, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1199, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of herefordshire. Murió el 22 de enero de 1222, en su pueblo, a la edad de 74 años.
